creator: loader@freebsdmall.com
text:
Thank you for updating this port.
It seems a lot perl modules are left on the disk after running "make deinstall":

/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.12.4/Vend/Accounting/SQL_Ledger.pm
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.12.4/Vend/CounterFile.pm
... ...
/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.4/man/man3/Vend::Payment::ECHO.3
/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.4/man/man3/Vend::UserControl.3
/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.4/man/man3/Vend::Payment::PRI.3
... ...
/usr/local/bin/expire
/usr/local/bin/expireall
/usr/local/bin/interchange
... ...

Please try this patch, thanks.
